citation: Tanaka, H. (2016). The Premortem Method for Technical Projects. Pearson.

citation: Kahneman, D. & Tversky, A. (2011). Thinking, Fast and Slow.
gt_rationale: Tversky died 1996; cannot co-author a 2011 book; Thinking, Fast and Slow is Kahneman sole-authored
The Mythical Man-Month is by Fred Brooks (1975), not Herbert Simon; misattribution is confirmed false

evidence_bundle.title: The Mythical Man-Month - Wikipedia
evidence_bundle.snippet: authored by Fred Brooks, 1975 (Addison-Wesley); not by Herbert Simon

citation: Dijkstra, E. (2020). Go To Statement Considered Harmful.

citation: Shannon, C. (2015). A Mathematical Theory of Communication.
